examples: NASA Earth Observatory image by Robert Simmon, using EO-1 ALI data.
The image is from the Advanced Land Imager on NASA's Earth Observing-1 (EO-1) satellite.
It has EO sensors, including a diode pumped laser designator and a long-range zoom FLIR.
The new EO also tightens the standards for keeping information classified for more than 25 years.
This EO formally acknowledges the risk and sheds light on how serious the problem is.
